subProducts.name: Motorised OIL Lubrication Systems
subProducts.heroDesc: Electric motor-driven centralized lubrication systems for CNC machining centers, lathes, and grinding machines.
subProducts.description:
Motorised lubrication systems use an electric motor-driven pump to automatically deliver precise amounts of oil or grease to all machine lubrication points at set intervals. Eliminates manual greasing, reduces bearing wear, and extends machine life significantly.

CENLUB motorised lubrication systems are the standard choice for CNC machining centers, VMC machines, lathes, and grinding machines across Tamil Nadu's manufacturing industry.
subProducts.metaTitle: Motorised Lubrication System Supplier Chennai | CENLUB Motor Lubricator Tamil Nadu | Apna Shree
subProducts.metaDescription: Buy CENLUB motorised lubrication systems in Chennai. Electric motor-driven centralized lubrication for CNC machines, lathes & grinding machines. Call +91 73583 76280.

subProducts.name: Pneumatic Lubrication Pumps
subProducts.heroDesc: Air-operated pneumatic lubrication pumps for grease and oil dispensing in industrial machinery.
subProducts.description:
Pneumatic lubrication pumps use compressed air to deliver lubricant — ideal where electrical power is not available or where explosion-proof operation is required. CENLUB pneumatic pumps handle both oil and grease efficiently.

Available in barrel-mount, pail-mount, and inline configurations for all industrial applications.
specifications: Reservoir: drum mount / pail mount / inline
keywords: air operated grease pump Tamil Nadu
subProducts.metaTitle: Pneumatic Lubrication Pump Supplier Chennai | CENLUB Air Pump Tamil Nadu | Apna Shree
subProducts.metaDescription: Buy CENLUB pneumatic lubrication pumps in Chennai. Air-operated grease & oil pumps for industrial machinery in Tamil Nadu. Call +91 73583 76280.

subProducts.name: Hand Operated  Oil & Grease Lubrication Pumps
subProducts.heroDesc: Manual hand-operated lubrication pumps for small machines, maintenance, and spot lubrication applications.
subProducts.description:
Hand-operated lubrication pumps are the simplest and most reliable way to lubricate machines that don't have automatic systems. CENLUB hand pumps are used for periodic maintenance greasing, small machine lubrication, and spot lubrication tasks.

Available in lever-action, plunger, and foot-operated variants.

subProducts.name: Rollon Turcite 'B' Slydway
subProducts.heroDesc: Self-lubricating, wear-resistant slideway liner material — a PTFE and sintered-bronze formulation that gives machine tool ways low friction, no stick-slip, and excellent positional accuracy.
subProducts.description: Rollon Turcite 'B' Slydway is a self-lubricating, wear-resistant bearing material for machine tool slideways and linear-movement applications. Made from PTFE combined with sintered bronze and special wear-resistant additives, it provides a very low coefficient of friction between two moving metal surfaces — eliminating stick-slip, damping vibration, and improving accuracy and repeatability. It can run dry without damaging the mating slide and is simple to install and finish using conventional machining methods. Apna Shree has been an authorized dealer for ROLLON Bearings Pvt. Ltd., Bangalore since 1993.
specifications: Material: PTFE + sintered bronze with special wear-resistant additives
Standard width: 12 inches (other widths on request)
Recommended mating surface hardness: 180–220 BHN or higher
Low coefficient of friction — can run dry without damaging the mating slide
applications: Combined linear, linear, prism and dovetail guidance
Turret tool holders and machine tables
